title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.759 - Friends of Missouri arboretum to be private support group
text:
174.759.  Friends of Missouri arboretum to be private support group. — A private support group, the Friends of the Missouri Arboretum, may be established to provide funding encouragement for the arboretum.  The director shall be the chief operating officer of the private support group.
(L. 1993 S.B. 84 § 14 subsec. 7)
